goal.title: G005 Official regression and final review gate
goal.objective: Run fresh verification, official or official-local-equivalent evaluator evidence as environment permits, ai-slop-cleaner no-op/pass on changed files, independent code-reviewer and architect review, then commit agent-owned artifacts/fixes only.

instruction:
Ultragoal aggregate-goal handoff
Plan: .omx/ultragoal/goals.json
Ledger: .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl
Goal: G005-g005-official-regression-and-final-r — G005 Official regression and final review gate

Codex goal integration constraints:
- Codex goal = the whole ultragoal run; OMX G001/G002/etc. = ledger stories.
- First call get_goal. If no active goal exists, call create_goal with the aggregate payload below.
- If get_goal reports the same aggregate objective as active, continue this OMX story without creating a new Codex goal.
- If a different active or incomplete Codex goal exists, finish/checkpoint that goal before starting this ultragoal; do not replace hidden Codex state from the shell.
- Ultragoal does not call /goal clear. After a completed aggregate run, manually run /goal clear in the Codex UI before starting another ultragoal run in the same session/thread.
- This is the final pending story: run the mandatory final ai-slop-cleaner pass, rerun verification, and run $code-review before any update_goal call.
- Final $code-review is clean only when it is APPROVE with architect status CLEAR and includes independentReview evidence from both code-reviewer and architect subagents.
- If final $code-review is non-clean, missing independentReview evidence, or independent delegation is unavailable/skipped/failed, do not call update_goal. Record durable blocker work first:
  omx ultragoal record-review-blockers --goal-id G005-g005-official-regression-and-final-r --title "Resolve final code-review blockers" --objective "<blocker-resolution objective>" --evidence "<review findings>" --codex-goal-json "<active get_goal JSON or path>"
- If final $code-review is clean (APPROVE + CLEAR + independent code-reviewer and architect subagent evidence), call update_goal({status: "complete"}), call get_goal again for a fresh complete snapshot, then checkpoint with --quality-gate-json.
- Checkpoint this OMX story with a fresh get_goal snapshot whose objective matches the aggregate payload and whose status is complete:
  omx ultragoal checkpoint --goal-id G005-g005-official-regression-and-final-r --status complete --evidence "<tests/files/PR evidence>" --codex-goal-json "<fresh complete get_goal JSON or path>" --quality-gate-json "<quality gate JSON or path>"
- If blocked or failed, checkpoint with --status failed and the failure evidence; rerun complete-goals --retry-failed to resume.

create_goal payload:
{
  "objective": "Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail."
}

Aggregate objective:
Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

Current OMX story objective:
Run fresh verification, official or official-local-equivalent evaluator evidence as environment permits, ai-slop-cleaner no-op/pass on changed files, independent code-reviewer and architect review, then commit agent-owned artifacts/fixes only.
